content:
创建一个科学研究项目，标题为 电力系统DAE仿真 AutoGen 多Agent协作闭环验证，领域为 Power System DAE Simulation / Transient Stability / Numerical Methods，目标是验证 Boxue-ZhiZhi-TanXi-MingLi-DuZhi-BianLun-YanZhen 从文献阅读、gap探索、假设生成、机制一致性验证到苏格拉底辩论迭代的完整协作闭环。请按以下步骤执行：第一步，调用 create_research_project 创建项目，项目信息如下：- title: 电力系统DAE仿真 AutoGen 多Agent协作闭环验证- domain: Power System DAE Simulation / Transient Stability Analysis / Numerical Integration Methods- objective: 验证电力系统微分代数方程仿真领域中，基于文献证据的 gap 发现、假设生成、机制检验和辩论迭代闭环。第二步，由博学 Boxue 启动 AutoGen GroupChat 协作闭环。调用 run_boxue_research_round：- execution_mode='autogen'- spawn_teammates=false- max_runtime_seconds=0- goal='围绕电力系统DAE仿真，系统阅读高影响综述、里程碑数值方法、最新顶刊关于刚性系统求解、事件处理、大规模稀疏矩阵、新能源并网稳定性成果和相关预印本，构建 PaperGraph，识别真实机制 gap，生成可证伪科学假设，并通过 YanZhen 机制一致性检验与 DuZhi/BianLun 苏格拉底辩论进行迭代。'第三步，AutoGen GroupChat 必须按以下角色闭环执行：1. Boxue_UserProxy职责：- 作为 Chief Research Scheduler 启动流程。- 不替代专家工作，只负责调度、质量门控和最终综合。- 最终报告必须判断闭环是否真正跑通。2. ZhiZhi_ToolAgent职责：- 执行文献阅读和 PaperGraph 构建。- 使用 providers=['semantic_scholar','arxiv']。- 若某个 provider 429 或无结果，不得中断全流程，应记录失败原因并继续。- 检索应覆盖以下层级：  L0: 电力系统DAE仿真高影响综述（如Kundur, Sauer, Milano等团队的数值方法综述）  L1: 隐式积分方法（BDF, Radau IIA）、一致初始化、事件检测里程碑成果  L2: 近5年顶刊关于刚性系统求解器、新能源并网暂态稳定、大规模稀疏矩阵并行计算、PMU数据驱动建模的最新成果  L3: arXiv 电力系统数值方法相关预印本  L4: 常规高质量补充文献（如指标系统、电压稳定、小信号分析相关）- 至少尝试导入 12 篇核心相关文献。- 若 L0/L1/L2 任一层为空，必须说明原因并递补。- 导入时必须过滤明显偏离电力系统DAE仿真核心的论文。3. TanXi_ToolAgent职责：- 基于 ZhiZhi 的 PaperGraph 进行 gap 探索。- 必须优先从文献中的 limitations、future work、mechanistic uncertainty、contradictory claims、numerical stability boundaries 中提取真实问题。- 至少输出 5 个候选 gap，并按科学价值排序。- 每个 gap 必须包含：  - gap_type: mechanism_gap | contradiction_gap | translation_gap | numerical_stability_gap | stiffness_boundary_gap | event_handling_gap | cross_system_migration_gap  - supporting_papers  - evidence_snippets  - why_not_pseudo_gap  - semantic_plausibility_reason  - novelty_score  - feasibility_score  - risk_of_false_gap4. MingLi_Proponent职责：- 从 TanXi 排名前 3 的 gap 中生成至少 2 个具体可证伪假设。- 每个假设必须包含：  - research_title  - source_gap_id  - hypothesis  - causal_chain: 输入条件 -> 中介机制 -> 可观测结果  - controllable_variables  - measurable_outputs  - expected_direction  - baseline_controls  - falsification_criteria  - difference_from_existing_literature  - minimal_experiment_plan- 禁止输出类似 'X improves the stability/accuracy/efficiency of DAE simulation' 的空泛机制描述。5. YanZhen_ToolAgent职责：- 对每个 MingLi 假设执行机制一致性检验。- 必须执行三层 CAWM 检验：  Layer 1: 内部逻辑一致性  Layer 2: 数据/文献一致性  Layer 3: regime shift / CAWM 风险测试- 每个假设至少测试两个 regime shift 条件，例如：  - 系统规模变化：小规模测试系统 vs 大规模实际电网  - 刚性比变化：弱刚性系统 vs 强刚性系统  - 时间步长变化：大步长 vs 小步长  - 事件密度变化：稀疏事件 vs 密集连续事件  - 新能源渗透率变化：低渗透率 vs 高渗透率- 输出：  - overall_verdict: MECHANISM_VERIFIED | CAWM_DETECTED | REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW  - layer_1_result  - layer_2_result  - layer_3_result  - cawm_risk_reason  - required_revision6. DuZhi_Opponent职责：- 对每个假设进行苏格拉底诘问。- 至少提出以下四类问题：  - conceptual_clarification: 关键术语是否可操作化（如'数值稳定性'是否区分为A-稳定性和L-稳定性）？  - causal_probe: 因果链中哪一环证据最弱（如BDF方法的收敛性与刚性比的关系）？  - constraint_check: 是否违反物理约束、计算复杂度、实时性要求或成本约束？  - counterexample_challenge: 在什么反例或边界条件下假设会失败（如极端刚性比或奇异摄动）？- 每个问题必须指向假设中的具体 claim。7. BianLun_GroupChatManager职责：- 综合 MingLi、YanZhen、DuZhi 的结果。- 判断每个假设：accept_for_experiment | revise | human_review | reject- 若假设需要修订，必须给出 refined_hypothesis。- 若存在根本分歧，必须输出 unresolved_issues。- 最终输出一份结构化 GroupChat 总结报告。第四步，最终回答必须包含以下字段：{  'project_id': '',  'boxue_round_id': '',  'autogen_run_id': '',  'groupchat_id': '',  'framework_used': 'autogen_2_groupchat',  'closed_loop_completed': true/false,  'agent_chain_observed': ['boxue','zhizhi','tanxi','mingli','yanzhen','duzhi','bianlun'],  'literature_summary': {    'imported_count': 0,    'layer_counts': {      'L0_review': 0,      'L1_milestone': 0,      'L2_top_latest': 0,      'L3_preprint': 0,      'L4_regular': 0    },    'provider_failures': []  },  'top_gaps': [],  'generated_hypotheses': [],  'yanzhen_verdicts': [],  'duzhi_questions': [],  'bianlun_final_decision': '',  'next_step': ''}重要约束：- 必须使用 AutoGen GroupChat 路径，不允许调用 CrewAI。- 不允许 spawn worktree teammate。- 不允许因为单个 provider 失败而停止。- 不允许把无关论文导入 PaperGraph。- 如果没有真正跑完闭环，必须明确说明卡在哪个 agent、哪个工具、哪个阶段。

[v4 context]
- workspace: C:\Users\31390\Desktop\2026挑战杯\claude-code
- hook events: OnToolEnd, OnToolStart, PostToolUse, PreToolUse, Stop, UserPromptSubmit

input.title: 电力系统DAE仿真 AutoGen 多Agent协作闭环验证
input.domain: Power System DAE Simulation / Transient Stability Analysis / Numerical Integration Methods
input.objective: 验证电力系统微分代数方程仿真领域中，基于文献证据的 gap 发现、假设生成、机制检验和辩论迭代闭环。

input.goal: 围绕电力系统DAE仿真，系统阅读高影响综述、里程碑数值方法、最新顶刊关于刚性系统求解、事件处理、大规模稀疏矩阵、新能源并网稳定性成果和相关预印本，构建 PaperGraph，识别真实机制 gap，生成可证伪科学假设，并通过 YanZhen 机制一致性检验与 DuZhi/BianLun 苏格拉底辩论进行迭代。

{
  "status": "imported",
  "record": {
    "paper_id": "paper_1783537756517988000",
    "unique_key": "doi:10_1109_access_2026_3697635",
    "title": "Transient Power System Analysis Using an Adaptive Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding With Padé-Based Stability Indicators",
    "citation": "Igor Delgado de Melo et al. (2026) Transient Power System Analysis Using an Adaptive Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding With Padé-Based Stability Indicators doi:10.1109/ACCESS.2026.3697635",
    "authors": [
      "Igor Delgado de Melo"
    ],
    "year": "2026",
    "venue": "IEEE Access",
    "provider": "semantic_scholar",
    "source_type": "api",
    "doi": "10.1109/ACCESS.2026.3697635",

    "url": "https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/033d2d8f1694eaba2b243606dc79b33f0f7c9113",
    "abstract": "Conventional power-system dynamic simulation methods rely predominantly on numerical integration schemes whose efficiency may deteriorate under stiff post-contingency conditions, while existing dynamic holomorphic embedding approaches remain constrained by convergence-radius limitations and the absence of adaptive mechanisms guided by analytical stability information. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an adaptive dynamic simulation framework based on the Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) combined with Padé approximation analysis. In the proposed approach, system dynamic variables are represented through Maclaurin series expansions whose effective convergence region is extended via Padé approximants, enabling explicit analytical trajectory representations through local series propagation. The framework incorporates detailed dynamic models, including synchronous-machine swing equations, excitation systems, turbine governors, and primary and secondary frequency control mechanisms. Two main contributions are introduced: first, an MS-HELM formulation for transient simulation that preserves the holomorphic structure while reducing computational effort relative to conventional dynamic HELM implementations; second, an online stability indicator based on the distance to the nearest Padé pole, augmented with temporal consistency filtering and controller-response awareness for adaptive time-step selection. Validation on IEEE benchmark systems and the Iceland power system demonstrates that the proposed method accurately reproduces post-contingency dynamic behavior while simultaneously improving robustness and reducing computational time by up to 90% relative to reference methods. Additionally, the proposed formulation preserves numerical accuracy comparable to that of the fourth-order Runge–Kutta method, yielding percentage differences below 0.1%.",

input.target_domain: Power System DAE Simulation / Transient Stability Analysis / Numerical Integration Methods

input.constraints: academic lab scale, public datasets only, small GPU budget

shifted_conditions: system scale: small IEEE 14-bus vs large 2000-bus system
stiffness ratio: weakly stiff (1e2) vs strongly stiff (1e6)

content.content:
{
  "thought": "DuZhi generated structured Socratic questions targeting definitions, constraints, causal links, evidence gaps, and counterexamples.",
  "action": {
    "type": "ask_socratic_questions",
    "hypothesis_id": "hyp_1783537812165435600",
    "question_types": [
      "conceptual_clarification",
      "causal_probe",
      "constraint_check",
      "counterexample_challenge"
    ]
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "question_type": "causal_probe",
      "question": "For the evidence-derived terms Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis, transient power system analysis, computational time | robustness | numerical accuracy | post-contingency dynamic behavior, which exact term sits at the intervention, mediator, and output positions of the causal chain?",
      "target_claim": "This proposal addresses the PaperGraph gap ''. It hypothesizes a testable mechanism: Concrete mechanism chain: (1) method capability: Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis co...[truncated]",
      "why_it_matters": "Domain-targeted causal probing forces MingLi to connect the hypothesis to field-specific entities without hardcoding the field.",
      "required_revision": "Rewrite the causal chain using at least two evidence-derived terms and mark unsupported links as assumptions.",
      "severity": "high"
    },
    {
      "question_type": "conceptual_clarification",
      "question": "What threshold converts the claimed improvement into a successful result rather than a vague positive trend?",
      "target_claim": "Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis is coupled with a mechanism-stress i...[truncated] If Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysi...[truncated]",
      "why_it_matters": "A falsifiable hypothesis needs a decision threshold or preregistered effect direction.",
      "required_revision": "Define a quantitative or ordinal success threshold and the minimum meaningful effect.",
      "severity": "medium"
    },
    {
      "question_type": "constraint_check",
      "question": "The evidence repeatedly mentions Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis, transient power system analysis, computational time | robustness | numerical accuracy | post-contingency dynamic behavior; which of these domain-specific constraints is actually required for the mechanism to hold?",
      "target_claim": "This proposal addresses the PaperGraph gap ''. It hypothesizes a testable mechanism: Concrete mechanism chain: (1) method capability: Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis co...[truncated]",
      "why_it_matters": "A strong critique should test the hypothesis against the concrete variables found in the retrieved literature, not only generic stress tests.",
      "required_revision": "Name the required evidence-derived constraint, its allowed range or qualitative regime, and how it will be monitored.",
      "severity": "medium"
    },
    {
      "question_type": "counterexample_challenge",
      "question": "What outcome should occur if biological_context: reported cohort/model organism/context -> different cohort, tissue, organism, or stress condition, and would that falsify the mechanism or only weaken it?",
      "target_claim": "This proposal addresses the PaperGraph gap ''. It hypothesizes a testable mechanism: Concrete mechanism chain: (1) method capability: Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis co...[truncated]",
      "why_it_matters": "Counterexamples reveal whether the mechanism has real explanatory content across regimes.",
      "required_revision": "Add predicted behavior under this shifted condition and define pass/fail interpretation.",
      "severity": "medium"
    },
    {
      "question_type": "counterexample_challenge",
      "question": "What outcome should occur if data_distribution: training/reference distribution -> out-of-distribution or low-data setting, and would that falsify the mechanism or only weaken it?",
      "target_claim": "This proposal addresses the PaperGraph gap ''. It hypothesizes a testable mechanism: Concrete mechanism chain: (1) method capability: Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis co...[truncated]",
      "why_it_matters": "Counterexamples reveal whether the mechanism has real explanatory content across regimes.",
      "required_revision": "Add predicted behavior under this shifted condition and define pass/fail interpretation.",
      "severity": "medium"
    },
    {
      "question_type": "counterexample_challenge",
      "question": "What outcome should occur if noise_level: nominal signal quality -> high-noise or missing-data condition, and would that falsify the mechanism or only weaken it?",
      "target_claim": "This proposal addresses the PaperGraph gap ''. It hypothesizes a testable mechanism: Concrete mechanism chain: (1) method capability: Multi-Stage Holomorphic Embedding Method (MS-HELM) with Padé approximation analysis co...[truncated]",
      "why_it_matters": "Counterexamples reveal whether the mechanism has real explanatory content across regimes.",
      "required_revision": "Add predicted behavior under this shifted condition and define pass/fail interpretation.",
      "severity": "medium"
    }
  ],
  "overall_severity": "high",
  "must_revise": true
}
